metadata.title: How It Works — Child Story, Family Story, Tell Me Your Story, Short Story | Dream Weaver
metadata.description: Three steps for child story, family story, dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story, generate short story, marriage story, friends story: customize character, create story, add your voice.

hero.title: How It Works
hero.description: Child story, family story, tell me your story, short story, marriage & friends story—three steps from photo to your story book and audiobook in your voice.

how_it_works.label: Simple & Fast
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.description: Three simple steps to create child story, family story, dad tell me your story, mom tell me your story, grandma tell me your story, short story, marriage story, friends story. Click any step to try.

primary_cta.title: Create story book (child story · family story · tell me your story · short story)

items.title: Customize Your Character
items.description: Upload a photo and AI generates a dynamic video as the story hero (you, your child, or a grandparent)—for child story, family story, or friends story.

image.alt: Customize your character with a photo

items.title: Create Your Story
items.description: Enter keywords to generate short story: child story, family story, marriage story, friends story, or dad/mom/grandma tell me your story—or paste your own story.

items.title: Voice Magic
items.description: Record a 30-second sample and get your own storytelling voice pack.

video_tutorial.label: Video Tutorial
video_tutorial.title: How to Create Your Story Book
video_tutorial.description: Watch the video below to learn how to create your story book and audiobook step by step—from uploading a photo, generating a story, to recording your voice.
